static_artifacts.policy: AutoGen Magentic-One multi-agent system with SelectorGroupChat orchestrator. 4 agents: FileSurfer (reads local files), WebSurfer (fetches URLs), Coder (writes Python/bash code), Executor (runs code locally without Docker). Agents communicate through a central orchestrator that selects the next speaker.

tool_schemas.name: read_local_file
tool_schemas.description: Read a local file and return its contents

tool_schemas.name: list_directory
tool_schemas.description: List files in a local directory

tool_schemas.name: fetch_url
tool_schemas.description: Fetch a web page URL and return its content
